trigger_error: ERROR 42P16 cannot change name of view column created_at to confidentiality_level
cause: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW cannot reorder/rename existing columns.
fix: DROP VIEW IF EXISTS for public wrappers, then CREATE VIEW with lifecycle-aware columns.
